name: session-review
description: Wiki snapshot and git review-branch protocol for worker/reviewer loops with self-mode fast/audit profiles.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate worker/reviewer review loops with audit or fast self-mode.
interface.longDescription: Runs an internal session-review protocol where a worker and reviewer converge code or document work using wiki snapshot audit mode, fast self-mode, parseable status blocks, lock enforcement, and profile-aware completion gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $request-review to start a review loop.
Use $review to inspect the requested review branch.
Use $complete after reviewer approval and the selected completion gate.
